title: Feur Dungeon Spawner
description: [Vanilla+] New cave structure, custom mob spawner and creatures.
body:
**Feur - Dungeon Spawner** enhances Minecraft's underground world by adding more than 15 unique and immersive structures to explore. These new additions turn your cave adventures into thrilling expeditions full of surprises and challenges.

You might stumble upon _**an abandoned prison**_, **_a deep_**, **_derelict mine_**, or the **_hidden lair of zombie miners_**. Explore a **_glimmering amethyst cave_**, but beware of the _ghosts_ that guard it, or delve into a mysterious **_redstone laboratory_**, protected by hostile robots.
